derivation_rule.logic: A valid pair requires: (1) a pregame snapshot fetched >= 2h before game_time with non-empty markets, and (2) a closing snapshot fetched within +/- 2h of game_time with non-empty markets. Both conditions must be met for the same match_id.
derivation_rule.pair_selection: best_pregame = latest snapshot among valid pregame candidates; best_closing = latest snapshot among valid closing candidates

root_cause_detail: Between P19 (2747 records, 859 match_ids) and P22/current (2788 records, 877 match_ids), 18 new unique match_ids were added to tsl_odds_history.jsonl. Of these 18 new match_ids, exactly 3 had sufficient data to form valid CLV pairs (both pregame and closing snapshots with markets data present). The remaining 15 new match_ids had incomplete coverage (no_pregame or no_closing).
reproducibility_note: The derivation logic is deterministic. Given the same tsl_odds_history.jsonl state and the same window parameters (pregame>=2h, closing+-2h), the same pair count is produced. The delta of 3 is explained entirely by 3 additional match_ids that accumulated both pre- and closing-window snapshots between P19 and P22 data captures.
p1_unblock_condition_note: Pair delta is fully explained and reproducible. No anomaly detected.
